_metadata.description: Global Taxi Tariff Database — OECD 38 + China & India
_metadata.data_vintage: Based on most recent official tariff schedules known through early 2025. Some rates may have been updated in 2025–2026. Verify against each country's transport authority for the absolute latest.
notes: All fares in local currency as indicated by 'currency' field.
minute_rate = charge per minute of waiting/slow traffic.
Where official per-minute rate unavailable, derived from hourly waiting charge.
Tariff schedules reflect the dominant regulated metered-taxi regime in each jurisdiction.
